title: Optimizing IT Infrastructure Upgrades
scenario: Develop a comprehensive plan to upgrade the IT infrastructure of a large enterprise with over 50,000 employees across 150 locations. The plan must include a detailed timeline, resource allocation, budget breakdown, and risk assessment. Assume the upgrade will take place over a period of 18 months, with the goal of minimizing downtime and ensuring business continuity. The output should be a 5-page document in markdown format.
constraints: Must use a Gantt chart to visualize the project timeline
Must include a detailed table with resource allocation and budget breakdown

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the plan have a clear logical structure and organization?
Does the plan adhere to the specified constraints?
Does the plan include a thorough risk assessment with mitigation strategies?
Is the tone professional, concise, and free of errors?
